item.title: Fleet registry directory (cloud/) created without mode 0700 — agent paths world-listable
item.intent: The cloud/ directory must always be created with mode 0700 regardless of which code path initializes it first. fleet.json initialization must not downgrade the directory to world-listable.
item.description: src/cloud/fleet/discovery.ts line 58 calls mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }) without a mode option, creating deployDir/cloud/ with default permissions (0755) when fleet is initialized before cloud credentials. fleet.json stores agent deployment directory paths — on a multi-user system, any user can ls the cloud/ directory to learn that fleet registration exists. BUG-078 fixes cloud/ for the credentials path but only when writeCloudCredentials() runs first; if fleet is registered before any credentials are stored, cloud/ is created at 0755 by discovery.ts. Fix: add DIR_MODE_SECRET import from defaults.js and pass { recursive: true, mode: DIR_MODE_SECRET } to mkdirSync at line 58. Note: no import from defaults.ts exists in discovery.ts currently.
